name: APC Smart-UPS X 2.2kVA Tower / 4U Rack Convertible UPS - 3 Hour Recharge - 208 V, 230 V Input - 208 V AC, 230 V AC Output - Sine Wave - 2 x IEC 320-C19, 2 x IEC Jumper, 8 x IEC 320-C13 - Network Card (SMX2200HVNC)
shortName: APC Smart-UPS X 2.2kVA Tower / 4U Rack Convertible UPS - 3 Hour
description: High-capacity convertible tower/rack UPS designed for large server deployments and data center environments requiring dual voltage support.
